resources.string: Control your PC from this phone
On the PC, open the Remote User app — it shows a QR code. Scan it and you are in. Everything else is guided on screen.
or paste the link from the PC window
That link does not look right — it should start with http and contain a token. Easiest: just scan the QR.
This can take a few seconds — a bit longer over mobile data.
Make sure the Remote User app on the PC is running, and that this phone is on the same Wi-Fi (or Tailscale is ON in its app). Then try again.
